fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Oklahoma Occupational Therapist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as an occupational therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to Oklahoma - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: occupational therapist license reciprocity oklahoma, how to transfer occupational therapist license to oklahoma, occupational therapist compact oklahoma, oklahoma occupational therapist endorsement application

board.name: Oklahoma Board of Medical Licensure — OT
board.parent_dept: Oklahoma State Board of Medical Licensure and Supervision
board.mailing_address: Oklahoma Board of Medical Licensure and Supervision, PO Box 18256, Oklahoma City, OK 73154-0256

quick_facts.exam_name: National Board for Certification in Occupational Therapy (NBCOT)

license_types.title: Occupational Therapist Registered (OTR)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice occupational therapy independently in Oklahoma.

license_types.title: Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant (COTA)
license_types.description: Requires an associate degree and practicing under the supervision of a licensed OTR.

steps.title: Register and Apply Online
steps.description: Create an account on the Oklahoma Board of Medical Licensure and Supervision's Thentia Cloud portal and complete the online Occupational Therapist application, including paying the initial application fee.

steps.title: Submit Supporting Documentation
steps.description: Arrange for official transcripts from your accredited OT program and verification of NBCOT certification to be sent directly to the Board. Upload supervised fieldwork reports or other required documents within your Thentia Cloud application.

steps.title: Complete Jurisprudence Exam
steps.description: Access and complete the Oklahoma Occupational Therapy Jurisprudence Exam, an open-book test available online through your Thentia Cloud account.

steps.title: Undergo Background Check
steps.description: Follow the specific instructions provided within your Thentia Cloud application to complete the required criminal history records search and pay the associated fee.

steps.title: Await Board Review
steps.description: The Board will review your complete application and all submitted documentation for approval. You will be notified via Thentia Cloud once a decision has been made.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NBCOT exam.

provisional_text: Oklahoma offers a temporary occupational therapy permit for new graduates who have completed an ACOTE-accredited program and are awaiting their NBCOT exam results. The temporary permit allows practice under the direct supervision of a licensed OTR. Contact the Oklahoma Board of Medical Licensure — OT for current temporary permit requirements and duration limits.
reciprocity_text: Oklahoma is a member of the OT Licensure Compact (OTC). Occupational therapists holding an active compact privilege may practice in Oklahoma without a separate state license. For those not eligible for compact privileges, Oklahoma also accepts standard endorsement applications with proof of current NBCOT certification and license verification from your home state.

faqs.question: How much does a Oklahoma OT license cost?
faqs.answer: The total initial application and licensing fee is approximately $100. Check the board website for the latest fee schedule.

faqs.question: Is NBCOT certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the NBCOT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across all states.

faqs.question: Does Oklahoma have reciprocity for occupational therapists?
faqs.answer: Oklahoma has enacted the OT Compact, but compact privileges are not yet issuing. For now, occupational therapists still apply by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my occupational therapist license to Oklahoma?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Oklahoma while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Oklahoma is a member of the OT Licensure Compact (OTC). Occupational therapists holding an active compact privilege may practice in Oklahoma without a separate state license. For those not eligible for compact privileges, Oklahoma also accepts standard endorsement applications with proof of current NBCOT certification and license verification from your home state.

hero.title: Become an Occupational Therapist in Oklahoma
hero.dek: To apply for an Occupational Therapist license in Oklahoma, new applicants must register and submit their application through the Oklahoma Board of Medical Licensure and Supervision's online system, Thentia Cloud.

official_links.portal_name: Thentia Cloud (Oklahoma Board of Medical Licensure and Supervision's online application and licensing management system)
official_links.registration_steps: Create an account by clicking "Register an Account" on the Thentia Cloud portal, then follow the prompts to set up a user ID and password to access the application system.
